title: Window Functions, Analytical Grain, and Time-Aware SQL
description: Service leaders need rankings, running effort, previous-event comparisons, and rolling metrics without collapsing detail rows. Learners cumulatively produce a time-aware service-level analytics report through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define window partition, order, and frame independently from final result ordering.
Choose ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, and NTILE with explicit tie semantics.
Use LAG, LEAD, FIRST_VALUE, and LAST_VALUE with deliberate ordering and frame behavior.
